response.justification: Strong fullstack background with 13+ years of experience spanning TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB — matching the primary stack well. Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly aligning with the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrates software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and has solid architecture exposure. Some gaps in Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, and PostgreSQL specifics, but the depth and breadth easily compensate.
strengths: 13+ years fullstack experience with TypeScript/Node.js/React and MongoDB
Direct AI-agent and MCP code generator experience at current role
Strong craftsmanship culture: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or PostgreSQL experience listed
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is dated (pre-2018)
Heavy DLang focus in mid-career may indicate less recent depth in mainstream enterprise stacks
